Class TripController

java.lang.Object
com.nomadtrack.nomadtrackserver.controller.TripController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/nomadTrack/trips") public class TripController extends Object

  • Method Details

    • createTrip

      @GetMapping @ResponseStatus(OK) public List<TripResponseDto> getAllMyTrips()

    • getAllUserTrips

      @GetMapping("/user/{userId}") @ResponseStatus(OK) public List<TripResponseDto> getAllUserTrips(@PathVariable("userId") Integer userId)

    • getTripById

      @GetMapping("/{countryName}") @ResponseStatus(OK) public List<TripRequestDto> getTripById(@PathVariable("countryName") String countryName)

    • getMapLocations

      @GetMapping("/map/locations") @ResponseStatus(OK) public List<MapPinDto> getMapLocations()

    • updateTrip

      @PutMapping("/{tripId}") @ResponseStatus(OK) public TripResponseDto updateTrip(@PathVariable("tripId") Integer tripId, @RequestHeader("Authorization") String authorizationHeader, @RequestBody TripRequestDto dto)

    • deleteTrip

      @DeleteMapping("/{tripId}") @ResponseStatus(NO_CONTENT) public void deleteTrip(@PathVariable("tripId") Integer tripId, @RequestHeader("Authorization") String authorizationHeader)
